Contact

SECURE THE VOTE
MARYLAND

SECURE THE VOTE MD is a local, non-partisan, all-volunteer, grassroots organization that formed to restore trust in Maryland elections. We advocate for transparent, non-partisan election processes, secure chain of custody for ballots and accurate tabulation.

Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram Youtube Telegram Whatsapp Link Link Link Link

Secure Maryland Elections

Join thousands of Marylanders demanding transparency, accountability, and security in our elections. Your signature matters.

Why This Matters

Maryland's election system needs transparency and accountability. We're calling for common-sense reforms that will restore trust and ensure every vote counts.

Our Key Demands:

  • ✓ Full forensic audit of voting machines and software
  • ✓ Mandatory voter ID for all elections
  • ✓ Chain of custody documentation for all ballots
  • ✓ Regular voter roll maintenance and verification
  • ✓ Public access to election process observation
  • ✓ Enhanced cybersecurity protections for voting systems

Add Your Name

Want to Do More?

Share this petition with friends, family, and colleagues. Together, we can build a movement for election security in Maryland.
